title: Auth - Login Success
description: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid credentials (nandika/klp123), verify 200 response with session cookie

title: Auth - Login Failure
description: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with invalid credentials, verify error response

title: Metrics - Unauthorized Access
description: GET /api/admin/metrics without auth, verify 401 {code: 'UNAUTHORIZED', message: 'Unauthorized'}

title: Metrics - Get Dashboard Metrics
description: GET /api/admin/metrics with auth, verify response contains {overview: {totalBookings, bookingsBulanIni, totalClients, totalOmset, pemasukanBulanIni, dpBulanIni}, topPackages, upcomingSessions, recentBookings, trendData}

title: Clients - List All Clients
description: GET /api/admin/clients with auth, verify response {items: [{id, name, email, phone, instagram, totalBooking, createdAt}]}

title: Clients - Create New Client
description: POST /api/admin/clients with {name, phone, email}, verify 201 response with created client data

title: Clients - Create Client Validation Error
description: POST /api/admin/clients with missing name, verify 400 validation error response

title: Clients - Update Client
description: PUT /api/admin/clients with {id, name, phone}, verify client updated successfully

title: Clients - Delete Client
description: DELETE /api/admin/clients with clientId, verify client deleted

title: Events - List All Bookings
description: GET /api/admin/events with auth, verify response {items: [{id, kodeBooking, namaClient, paket, tanggalSesi, status, dpStatus, hargaPaket, galleryCount}]}

title: Events - Create New Booking
description: POST /api/admin/events with {clientId, packageId, tanggalSesi, lokasiSesi}, verify booking created

title: Events - Create Booking Validation
description: POST /api/admin/events with missing required fields, verify 400 validation error

title: Galleries - List All Galleries
description: GET /api/admin/galleries with auth, verify response {items: [{id, namaProject, status, clientToken, viewCount, photoCount, selectionCount, clientName, storageProvider}]}

title: Galleries - Create New Gallery
description: POST /api/admin/galleries with {bookingId, namaProject}, verify gallery created with unique clientToken

title: Galleries - Get Gallery by ID
description: GET /api/admin/galleries/[id] with auth, verify gallery details with photos

title: Galleries - Update Gallery
description: PUT /api/admin/galleries/[id] with updated data, verify changes applied

title: Galleries - Delete Gallery
description: DELETE /api/admin/galleries/[id], verify gallery deleted

title: Packages - List All Packages
description: GET /api/admin/packages with auth, verify response {items: [{id, namaPaket, kategori, harga, deskripsi}]}

title: Settings - Get Vendor Settings
description: GET /api/admin/settings with auth, verify vendor profile data

title: Settings - Update Vendor Settings
description: PATCH /api/admin/settings with updated profile, verify changes saved

title: Settings - List Cloudinary Accounts
description: GET /api/admin/settings/cloudinary/accounts with auth, verify list of configured accounts

title: Settings - Add Cloudinary Account
description: POST /api/admin/settings/cloudinary/accounts with account credentials, verify account added

title: Public - Get Gallery by Token
description: GET /api/public/gallery/[token] with valid token, verify gallery data returned

title: Public - Get Gallery Invalid Token
description: GET /api/public/gallery/[token] with invalid token, verify 404 error

title: Public - Get Selection Count
description: GET /api/public/gallery/[token]/count, verify current selection count

title: Public - Select Photo
description: POST /api/public/gallery/[token]/select with photoId, verify selection saved

title: Public - Deselect Photo
description: POST /api/public/gallery/[token]/select with photoId (toggle off), verify selection removed

title: Public - Select Photo Exceeds Limit
description: POST /api/public/gallery/[token]/select when max selections reached, verify 400 error

title: Public - Send Notification
description: POST /api/public/gallery/[token]/notify after selection complete, verify notification sent

title: Bookings - Get Booking by ID
description: GET /api/admin/bookings/[id] with auth, verify booking details with payments
